headline: Jefferies Raises its Price Target on Baker Hughes (BKR) to $80 from $67
summary: Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) is one of the 7 Best Geothermal Stocks to Buy Now. On April 26, 2026, Jefferies raised its price target on Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) to $80 from $67 and maintained a Buy rating following the company’s Q1 report. The firm said the earnings call reinforced a “constructive” long-cycle outlook and […]
